description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front facade. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes a small garden area with palm trees and shrubs at the rear. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan material, likely stucco or concrete, with some sections accented by darker panels. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the extensive glazing, and a blue bed is noticeable in one of the front rooms. The roof is mostly flat and accessible, with some rooftop elements and planters. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows, beige exterior walls, and a rear garden with palm trees. The design features open spaces and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing large floor-to-ceiling windows, a blue bed in a front room, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, multiple rooms, and the rear garden with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garden area, palm trees, and the back facade with smaller windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long exterior wall, rear garden, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and grouped side windows
